notes: 0.77.0 TRUE GENESIS ARCHIVE (#156): [F] now syncs+holds the COMPLETE chain genesis->tip (base pinned at genesis, live-flippable; recent-window stays light-monitor-only) — your PC becomes a redundant full archive. Render never blocks on the sync mutex (fixes the Windows full-sync BLACK SCREEN). Pooled keep-alive HTTP clients (fixes Windows ephemeral-port exhaustion / tip frozen). Honest mode labels: LIGHT MONITOR (verifies tip, holds nothing) vs FULL ARCHIVE (genesis->tip, holds everything).
